project_type: Nx monorepo with Angular frontend, Lambda API, CDK infrastructure
build_system: Nx 22.7.3 with pnpm. CDK is run via `pnpm cdk` (aws-cdk CLI as devDependency). CDK app entry: `pnpm exec ts-node --project apps/infra/tsconfig.app.json apps/infra/src/main.ts`
test_framework: No test runner currently configured (Vitest recommended per steering docs). CDK assertions available via aws-cdk-lib/assertions.
verification_instructions: 1. Run `pnpm install` to install dependencies. 2. Run `pnpm nx build infra` to compile CDK code. 3. Run `pnpm cdk synth` to validate CloudFormation template generation.
snapshot_or_generated_files: cdk.out/ directory is generated by `pnpm cdk synth` but is not checked in (gitignored)
environment_constraints: Node.js v22.22.3 and pnpm 10.28.1 are available. Dependencies need to be installed with `pnpm install`.
contribution_requirements: CDK patterns: PascalCase construct IDs, RemovalPolicy.DESTROY for all resources, high-level grant methods for permissions
key_patterns: Single CDK stack in apps/infra/src/stacks/recipe-manager-stack.ts. All resources defined in one stack class. CfnOutput for important values. aws-cdk-lib 2.257.0 includes aws-s3-deployment as a submodule (BucketDeployment construct). The S3 bucket uses KMS encryption with a custom key.
directory_structure: apps/api/ - Lambda handler, apps/infra/ - CDK infrastructure, apps/web/ - Angular SPA, libs/shared/ - shared types
